identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss precision with Organic warmth.
Content is King: Data density for Admins, clarity for Employees.
Negative Space: Use whitespace to reduce cognitive load in complex HR tasks.
Contrast: High contrast for readability, soft backgrounds for comfort.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-all

cards.style: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.style: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

status_badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

visual_enhancers.gradients: None. Use solid colors and subtle textures.
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-md for dropdowns/modals. Avoid large diffuse shadows.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on the main background (optional) to reduce digital sterility.

login_hero.description: Diverse team in modern office, professional and welcoming.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE TAILWIND CONFIG: Replace the 'colors' object in tailwind.config.js with the HSL values provided in 'colors.base'.
2. UPDATE INDEX.CSS: Add the @import for fonts at the top. Update the :root variables to match the HSL values.
3. FONT USAGE: Apply 'font-sans' (Manrope) to headings and 'font-body' (Public Sans) to text. You may need to extend the font family in tailwind config.
4. LAYOUT: For the Admin Dashboard, use a Sidebar Layout (Left fixed sidebar, right scrollable content). For Employee Dashboard, use a Mobile-First Stack Layout.
5. COMPONENTS: Use Shadcn UI components. Customize them to match the 'Slate & Sage' aesthetic (clean borders, minimal shadows).
6. LANGUAGE: Ensure all UI text is in Portuguese (PT) as requested.
7. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) for testing.
8. NO MOCKING: Implement actual logic where possible, but if backend is not ready, structure the frontend to easily connect later.
9. THEME: Enforce Light Mode by default. Do not use dark mode unless explicitly toggled (but design system supports it via variables).
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic 'AI slop' designs. Use generous spacing (p-8+).
Micro-interactions are mandatory (hover, active, focus states).
Do not use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Manrope'.
Ensure high contrast for text (WCAG AA compliant).
